text: Grace Leisure completely exceeded our expectations. Every detail was perfectly planned and our guide's knowledge was extraordinary. Sigiriya at sunrise was simply breathtaking — I'll cherish this memory forever.
name: Ayman Al-Rashid

text: From landing to departure, everything was seamless. The wildlife safari at Yala was truly something I'll never forget. We saw four leopards in a single morning! Outstanding service and professionalism throughout.
name: Shimon Ben-David

text: Our Sinharaja bird watching tour was magical. Our guide spotted species we'd only ever seen in field guides! World-class birding combined with the warmest Sri Lankan hospitality. Highly, highly recommended!
name: Sara Delacroix

text: I've travelled to over 40 countries and Grace Leisure provided one of the best-organised tours I have ever experienced. The cultural tour through Kandy and Polonnaruwa was deeply moving. The team is truly exceptional.
name: Marcus Weber

text: The highlight was seeing hundreds of elephants gather at Minneriya at dusk — absolutely life-changing. Grace Leisure arranged everything flawlessly. Our guide was knowledgeable, funny and incredibly attentive.
name: Emma & James Tillotson

text: We had a family of 6 including two small children and Grace Leisure made every activity perfectly age-appropriate. The Kosgoda turtle release was pure magic for the kids. A trip all 6 of us will remember forever.
name: Patricia Nguyen

text: The tea country around Nuwara Eliya was even more beautiful than I imagined. Our guide arranged a private tea factory visit which was the highlight of the trip. Absolutely perfect planning from start to finish.
name: Hiroshi Yamamoto

text: Ranmal and his team went above and beyond at every step. When our plans changed due to weather, they reorganised everything instantly with no fuss. This is what top-tier service looks like. Will absolutely return.
name: Lucia Martínez

text: Our honeymoon in Sri Lanka was everything we dreamed of and more. Grace Leisure arranged the most romantic sunrise at Sigiriya, a whale-watching cruise from Mirissa and a candlelit beach dinner in Bentota. Simply perfect.
name: Ryan & Sophie O'Brien
